# CWE-918 vulnerable: client-controlled fetch URL
lang: go
file: CWE-918-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery — handler fetches arbitrary client URL.
// Vulnerable: http.Get uses c.Query("url") without host allowlisting.

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ProxyPreview() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		target := c.Query("url")
		resp, err := http.Get(target)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		defer resp.Body.Close()
		body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.Data(resp.StatusCode, resp.Header.Get("Content-Type"), body)
	}
}
